name: send_msg_id
full_help:
send_msg_id

Description: 
Send message by id

Syntax: 
send_msg_id  [-continue] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<id>] <severity> <msg>

Usage: 
  Name         Description
  ------------------------
  [-continue]  Continue the execution of the current tcl script (if any) in 
               cases where severity is ERROR. Default behavior is to 
               terminate the currently executing script on ERROR.
  [-quiet]     Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]   Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<id>]       Unique message prefix and id to be sent e.g. 'Common 17-1'.
  <severity>   Message severity to send, e.g. "ALL", "ERROR" or "CRITICAL 
               WARNING"
  <msg>        Complete formated message text in double quotes

Categories: 
Report
